title: Orb Of Origins - Crafting Recipe
description: Since I couldn't find one I liked for 1.20.1, I decided to make my own.
body:
Since I couldn't find any version I liked, that was compatible with 1.20.1, and for Fabric, I decided to make my own, using the [The Origin Creator](https://www.mathgeniuszach.com/apps/origin-creator/) and the [Crafting](https://crafting.thedestruc7i0n.ca/) datapack creator.

Feel free to use it in any Mod-Packs, Videos, Whatever.

Go nuts.
